source_display: Sweet Spot Paradox in AI Positioning
evidence: The real opportunity lies with the middle segment—people competent enough to use ChatGPT projects or custom GPTs but who hit concrete limitations when they try to do serious work. They're smart enough to feel the pain but not technical enough to architect their own infrastructure.

source_display: Sweet Spot Paradox in AI Positioning
evidence: Value comprehension follows an inverse U-curve with technical capability. At low technical capability, users evaluate tools by outcomes. At high technical capability, users evaluate tools by components. Both groups miss the middle ground.

source_display: Sweet Spot Paradox in AI Positioning
evidence: Positioning must target the transition point—users who are 'smart enough to use projects and custom GPTs' but are hitting the limitations of those approaches. These users feel the pain without having the technical vocabulary to articulate what would solve it.

source_display: Sweet Spot Paradox in AI Positioning
